UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: ugly child
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was quite an ugly child. [PAWN_pronoun] worked extra hard to make friends.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: staggeringly ugly child
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a staggeringly ugly child. [PAWN_pronoun] worked extra hard to make friends, baking treats for the rest of the colony to win favor.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: tunnel kid
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] loved exploring and expanding the tunnels that extended from his home. [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed any kind of digging, even helping plow and till [PAWN_possessive] colony's farms.

UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.title: assassin
UnifiedBackstories.ZCBackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] loved watching [PAWN_possessive] enemies die through a scope. Or [PAWN_possessive] friends, [PAWN_pronoun] wasn't picky.
